title: No Way Back
writer: Stefan Osiecki, Terence de Marney, Thomas Burke
actors: Terence de Marney, Eleanor Summerfield, Jack Raine
plot: A boxer (Terence de Marney) goes on a downward spiral after an injury. He loses his money, wife and family. Old girlfriend Beryl (Eleanor Summerfield) tries to help him but he gets tied up with a police siege.
